barRaise.topFinding: The survival loop closed, and that is the headline four reviews have been waiting for. The committed HEAD (v0.57.10) is now a playable end-to-end slice: waves spawn on the pulse/horde cadence, surviving past the final horde day (28) trips _on_day_advanced_check_win and shows the win screen, and Oil-zero or a destroyed Command Post routes to the loss screen. Fog of War is a mature shipped system, not an unwritten piece as earlier reviews assumed. The uncommitted v0.58.0 in the tree (Sonic Pressure wave-tier scaling plus convoy resupply) is polish layered on a loop that already runs, not the loop itself. The verdict jumps two tiers from at-risk to needs-attention. What is left is housekeeping: land v0.58.0, fix a corrupted dashboard field, and finally untrack the five .bak files the changelog already claims are gone.
